creator: vova@fbsd.ru
text:
After last update evolution stops to work it shows on startup:

% evolution
GTK Accessibility Module initialized
Bonobo accessibility support initialized
CalDAV Eplugin starting up ...

(evolution-2.6:83157): evolution-shell-WARNING **: Cannot activate 'OAFIID:GNOME_Evolution_Tasks_Component:2.6': Can't find symbol Bonobo_Plugin_info in `/usr/X11R6/lib/evolution/2.6/components/libevolution-calendar.so'


(evolution-2.6:83157): evolution-shell-WARNING **: Cannot activate 'OAFIID:GNOME_Evolution_Memos_Component:2.6': Can't find symbol Bonobo_Plugin_info in `/usr/X11R6/lib/evolution/2.6/components/libevolution-calendar.so'


(evolution-2.6:83157): evolution-shell-WARNING **: Cannot activate 'OAFIID:GNOME_Evolution_Addressbook_Component:2.6': Can't find symbol Bonobo_Plugin_info in `/usr/X11R6/lib/evolution/2.6/components/libevolution-addressbook.so'


(evolution-2.6:83157): evolution-shell-WARNING **: Cannot activate 'OAFIID:GNOME_Evolution_Calendar_Component:2.6': Can't find symbol Bonobo_Plugin_info in `/usr/X11R6/lib/evolution/2.6/components/libevolution-calendar.so'


(evolution-2.6:83157): evolution-shell-WARNING **: Cannot activate 'OAFIID:GNOME_Evolution_Mail_Component:2.6': Can't find symbol Bonobo_Plugin_info in `/usr/X11R6/lib/evolution/2.6/components/libevolution-mail.so'


(evolution-2.6:83157): evolution-shell-WARNING **: Unknown component mail

And then show empty shell witndow with only button on tool-bar Send/Receive.

# portupgrade -fR evolution

rebuilds all depending ports but did not helps.

Looks like it happens after upgrade of following ports (with portupgrade)
+ www/linux-firefox (linux-firefox-1.5.0.6)
+ devel/dbus (dbus-0.62)
+ devel/apache-ant (apache-ant-1.6.5_1)
+ net/avahi (avahi-0.6.13_2)
+ x11-toolkits/pango (pango-1.12.3)
+ net/gq (gq-1.0.0,1)

First I thought that problem in changed pango libs and rebuild evething depending on pango - no luck.
It still failed with same diagnostic.

Than I've tries to rebuild every port required for evolution by
# portupgrade -fR evolution
- same result. So I have no any other ideas what is wrong.

Any help will be very appriciated.

How-To-Repeat: 

Upgrade to recent evolution
